text.title: Mocking Strategies Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are drivers present (is_own_code, is_io_or_time_or_random, verify_calls_needed, stateful_reuse_count)?

conclusion.verdict: Leave the real implementation in place; do not mock internal collaborators.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND is_own_code == false AND stateful_reuse_count > 3

conclusion.verdict: Author a Fake (in-memory working impl) under the adapter layer.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND is_own_code == false AND stateful_reuse_count <= 3 AND verify_calls_needed == true

conclusion.verdict: Use Mock with autospec; pin expected call signature.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND is_own_code == false AND stateful_reuse_count <= 3 AND verify_calls_needed == false

conclusion.verdict: Use Stub — canned return values only.
